tags.name: app-shell
tags.description:
The core layout component for the application.
Handles theme switching, FAB configurations, and navigation slotting.
Uses Material Design 3 tokens and components.

slots.name: app-content
slots.description: The place for the dynamic application content

cssProperties.name: --blog-post-animation
cssProperties.description:
The duration of the animation for \`:focus\`, \`:hover\`,
\`:focus-within\`, and \`:focus-visible\` states

cssProperties.name: --blog-post-primary-text-color
cssProperties.description: The color of the primary text

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text label displayed next to the FAB item.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: The icon to display inside the FAB item.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The text label displayed next to the FAB item.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: The icon to display inside the FAB item.

cssProperties.description: The logical `padding-inline-end` value

cssProperties.name: --fab-menu-item-padding-start
cssProperties.description: The logical `padding-inline-start` value

tags.name: fab-menu
tags.description: A floating action button that toggles a menu of actions.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: [object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

attributes.name: opened-icon
attributes.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: [object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: The `aria-label` of the FAB.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: The direction in which the menu items should expand.

properties.name: open
properties.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: [object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

properties.name: openedIcon
properties.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

properties.name: variant
properties.description:
The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

properties.name: size
properties.description:
The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

properties.name: label
properties.description: [object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

properties.name: ariaLabel
properties.description: The `aria-label` of the FAB.

properties.name: direction
properties.description: The direction in which the menu items should expand.

cssProperties.name: --fab-menu-transition-duration
cssProperties.description: The duration of the menu's opening and closing animations.

tags.name: nav-component
tags.description: A navigation component that renders primary tabs synchronized with the application's URL hash routes.

cssProperties.name: --nav-component-icon-animation
cssProperties.description: The duration of the icon's fill and color transition.

cssProperties.name: --nav-component-icon-animation-reduced
cssProperties.description: The duration of the icon's transition when motion is reduced.

tags.name: partial-header
tags.description: A header component used for section titles with support for primary, secondary, and tertiary Material color variants.

attributes.name: heading-text
attributes.description: The text to display within the header.

attributes.name: header-type
attributes.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

properties.name: headingText
properties.description: The text to display within the header.

properties.name: headerType
properties.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

tags.name: profile-section
tags.description:
A reusable section component for profile-related content.
Uses container queries to provide a responsive grid layout that adapts to available space.

API
--

attributes.name: section-title
attributes.description:
The title displayed in the section's header.
Maps to the `section-title` attribute.

properties.name: sectionTitle
properties.description:
The title displayed in the section's header.
Maps to the `section-title` attribute.

tags.name: word-cloud
tags.description: A component that renders a cloud of words with various sorting and grouping options.

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

properties.name: words
properties.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

properties.name: instantClear
properties.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

properties.name: appearance
properties.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

properties.name: grouping
properties.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

properties.name: sorting
properties.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

properties.name: delay
properties.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

properties.name: threshold
properties.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation
cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation for each word.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-animation-reduced
cssProperties.description: Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight).

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the first weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the second weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the second weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the third weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the third weight quartile.

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size
cssProperties.description: Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight).

cssProperties.name: --word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height
cssProperties.description: Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile.

attributes.name: word
attributes.description: The tagged word

attributes.name: heaviness
attributes.description:
The weight of the tag (text & border), can be
`"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or
`"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

properties.name: word
properties.description: The tagged word

properties.name: heaviness
properties.description:
The weight of the tag (text & border), can be
`"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or
`"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

cssProperties.name: --word-tag-color
cssProperties.description: The text and border color

cssProperties.name: --word-tag-background-color

cssProperties.description: The line height

cssProperties.name: --word-tag-border-radius
cssProperties.description: The corner radius (for all corners)

tags.name: work-experience
tags.description:
A component for displaying professional work experience entries.
Supports nesting for sub-roles or specific project assignments under a single employer.

attributes.name: is-nested
attributes.description: If true, adjusts font sizes and layout for a nested appearance.

attributes.name: experience-role
attributes.description: The title of the professional role or project.

attributes.name: experience-org
attributes.description: The name of the organization or client.

attributes.name: date-start
attributes.description: Start date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

attributes.name: date-end
attributes.description: End date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

attributes.name: summaries
attributes.description: A list of summary points describing achievements or responsibilities.

attributes.name: jobs
attributes.description: A list of sub-jobs or project assignments to be rendered as nested experiences.

properties.name: isNested
properties.description: If true, adjusts font sizes and layout for a nested appearance.

properties.name: experienceRole
properties.description: The title of the professional role or project.

properties.name: experienceOrg
properties.description: The name of the organization or client.

properties.name: dateStart
properties.description: Start date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

properties.name: dateEnd
properties.description: End date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

properties.name: summaries
properties.description: A list of summary points describing achievements or responsibilities.

properties.name: jobs
properties.description: A list of sub-jobs or project assignments to be rendered as nested experiences.

properties.name: isNested=false
properties.description: Whether this is a nested instance

properties.name: experienceOrg=""
properties.description: The employer formal name

properties.name: experienceSummary=""
properties.description: An optional summary of the overall role

properties.name: summaries=[]
properties.description: An array of `{ item: string }` objects describing the responsibilities

properties.name: object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object
